header.currencyNote: Amounts are grouped by original currency without FX conversion

observations.title: Observation Explorer
observations.description: Trace business risk facts to production rules and source evidence. Amounts remain in their original currency.
observations.empty: No risk observations match these filters
observations.detailDescription: Review the business fact, calculation, and current source snapshot
observations.selectPrompt: Select an observation to inspect its facts and evidence chain
observations.noEvidence: No evidence is available for this observation

ai.title: AI Data Assistant
ai.subtitle: Business insights based on the current Data Ops context
ai.noHistory: No history yet. Completed conversations are saved automatically.
ai.startDescription: Choose a suggested question or describe what you want to analyze below
ai.placeholder: Enter a business question, for example: list collection risks in a table
ai.followUpsDescription: Click a question to start the next analysis

empty.thinking: Reading context and preparing an answer

daily_review.title: Daily Business Review
questions: Which business risks should I prioritize today?
How healthy are our contracts, collections, and outstanding receivables?
Which customers or owners need immediate follow-up?

cash_risk.title: Collections and Risk
questions: Which customers, projects, or owners account for most collection risk?
Which expiring contracts need attention on collections or renewals?
Prioritize collection follow-ups by financial impact.

pipeline.title: Pipeline Insights
questions: Where are the conversion risks in the domestic and overseas pipelines?
Which pipeline projects deserve the strongest sales focus?
Which high-value pipeline opportunities have stalled?

oversea.title: Overseas Business
questions: Which countries or product types perform best in overseas sales?
Which licenses expire soon and need early renewal or delivery follow-up?
What looks unusual in overseas project revenue, cost, and margin?

data_quality.title: Data Quality
questions: Are the current Feishu sync results reliable enough for business analysis?
Which tables have permission, missing-field, or incomplete-collection risks?
Which data issues must be fixed before this week's business review?

records.title: Sync History
records.subtitle: Select a run to review changes for each table
records.noResult: This job has not produced table-level results yet.

quality.label: Data quality · {status}
quality.title: Business Analysis Reliability Check
quality.description: Assess whether current data is suitable for business analysis using sync jobs, field completeness, currency treatment, and date anomalies.
quality.currencyNote: Amounts are grouped by original currency.
quality.mixedCurrencyDetail: Amounts are grouped by original currency without FX conversion.
quality.mixedCurrencyRecommendation: Add a unified FX basis to business views; original-currency totals should be used only for detailed reconciliation.

banner.unchecked: Feishu access has not been checked
banner.uncheckedText: Run a Feishu access check to verify data sources.
banner.issues: {count} tables have permission, field, or completeness issues.

feedback.refreshRunning: The Feishu update check is still running. Refresh again later.
feedback.tablesUnchanged: Feishu data checked: {count} tables had no changes.
feedback.noChanges: Feishu update check completed with no changes.
feedback.fullSyncRunning: The full sync is still running. Refresh later to view its status.
feedback.analysisEmpty: The analysis completed, but the model returned no displayable answer. Try again or narrow the scope.
feedback.preflightEmpty: Feishu access check completed: no tables available to check.
feedback.preflightFailed: Feishu access check completed: {failed} failed, {warning} warnings, {total} checked. {discovery}
feedback.preflightWarning: Feishu access check completed: {warning} need attention, {total} checked. {discovery}
feedback.preflightOk: Feishu access check completed: all {total} tables are readable. {discovery}
feedback.discovery: Discovered {seen} Feishu tables and matched {matched} automatically.

progress.questionDetail: Decide whether business data is needed and select the analysis domain.
progress.contextDetail: Load the latest contract, collection, pipeline, and sync context.
progress.planDetail: Determine the tables, filters, metrics, and output needed for the answer.
progress.reasoningDetail: Use business evidence to separate symptoms, root-cause hypotheses, system impact, and validation actions.
progress.toolDetail: Read and aggregate the business data required for this analysis.
progress.answerDetail: Organize the findings, priorities, and recommended next actions.

executive.actionListDescription: Priority actions derived from cash collection, renewals, and growth opportunities.
executive.trendDescription: Review monthly, quarterly, or yearly trends with period-over-period comparisons.
executive.keyCustomersDescription: Collections and outstanding amounts aggregated from the revenue ledger
executive.salesRankingDescription: Owners ranked by high-potential projects and outstanding amounts
executive.riskDescription: Focus on renewal alerts and large outstanding balances.

metrics.fullBalance: Total balance, not new this month

headline.stalled: Collections have stalled; prioritize outstanding receivables
headline.outstanding: Large outstanding balances need owner follow-up
headline.renewal: Renewal windows are approaching; confirm plans early
headline.normal: No significant high-risk signals in current business data

actions.cashNext: Confirm the expected payment date and blockers, then update this week's collection progress.
actions.renewalNext: Confirm renewal intent, pricing, and internal approval timing, then establish a clear renewal plan.
actions.growthNext: Add the current stage, next milestone, and expected signing date.

summary.renewal: {count} renewal alerts in the next {days} days

trend.signedDescription: Bars show amounts; the line shows adjacent-period growth.
trend.cashDescription: Compare cash inflow and expenses, with a line for the net difference.
trend.netTitle: Net Operating Difference and Period Change
trend.netDescription: Track whether net operating inflow and its rate of change are improving.

pipeline.title: Project Pipeline Analytics
pipeline.subtitle: {count} projects · Synced from Feishu Base
pipeline.renewalSummary: {future} contracts expire in the next 90 days · {expired} already expired
pipeline.potentialCaption: Based on project flags; amounts remain in original currencies
pipeline.riskCaption: Due within 30 days or overdue collection

failure.title: Feishu Data Sync Failed
failure.details: View detailed errors and recommendations for {count} tables
failure.readFailed: Failed to read the Feishu table.
failure.retry: Save the settings, run an access check, and retry the affected table before starting a full sync.

recommendations.app_access_denied: Add the Feishu application as a collaborator on the target Base and grant record read access.
recommendations.config_missing: Use a Feishu Base URL containing the table parameter to provide both App Token and Table ID.
recommendations.field_access_denied: Grant field read access to the application and publish the updated permission configuration.
recommendations.field_missing: Check whether source fields were renamed or deleted, then update the field mapping.
recommendations.network_error: Check network, DNS, and proxy access from the service to open.feishu.cn.
recommendations.pagination_incomplete: Use the request trace ID to inspect Feishu API logs and pagination tokens.
recommendations.table_access_denied: Verify that App Token and Table ID belong to the same Base and grant record read access.
recommendations.token_error: Verify the Feishu App ID and App Secret and confirm that the application is enabled.
recommendations.unknown: Inspect API logs using the request ID and Feishu response details.
recommendations.zero_records_unexpected: Check source record counts, view filters, and the application's data visibility.
